## Type of change

<!-- Check all that apply. -->

- [ ] Feature — new behavior or endpoint
- [ ] Fix — bug correction
- [ ] Pipeline / agent change (`src/agents/`)
- [ ] Normalizer change (`src/app/api/webhooks/_normalizers/`)
- [ ] Database migration (`db/migrations/`)

## Testing

<!-- How was this tested? -->

- [ ] `task monitor:test` passes
- [ ] `task monitor:typecheck` passes
- [ ] `task monitor:build` passes

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch follows naming: `feat/<description>`, `fix/<description>`, or `docs/<description>`
- [ ] Tests added or updated for new logic
- [ ] Relevant docs under `docs/` updated
- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env`, tokens, keys)
- [ ] No breaking changes (or documented above if there are)
